testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify searching for a hockey team
steps: Verification: Expect page to reload with search results for Oilers

testCases.title: Verify navigating to page 5 of the hockey data
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=5'
expected: Page 5 of the hockey data is displayed

testCases.title: Verify navigating to the next page of hockey data
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change and increment page number in url
expected: The next page of hockey data is displayed

testCases.title: Verify selecting 100 items per page
steps: Verification: Expect page to reload with 100 items per page
